perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a brightly lit supermarket environment. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, holds a plastic bag containing four roasted chicken legs. She points at the product, gestures with her hand to show the size of a single chicken leg compared to her palm, and looks directly at the camera with an excited expression. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor setting with a table. Two women are present; the main character from the first part and another woman wearing a blue hat. They are both wearing disposable plastic gloves and are eating the chicken legs. The main character takes a large bite out of a chicken leg while the other woman gestures and speaks. They hold up the chicken to the camera to show the texture and the juices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop background music begins immediately. A young woman's voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone, introducing a new 4-pack roasted chicken leg product at a store. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the dialogue shifts to a detailed review of the product's price, quantity, and taste. Occasional cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) like bells and sparkle sounds are heard coinciding with on-screen text highlights. (3) The audio remains consistent as the two women discuss the food while eating, with the music fading slightly under their dialogue.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "小家庭必買 4入新" (Hook: Recommendation for small families, indicating a new 4-pack product). (2) "4入正式來了" (Functional: Stating the product is officially available). (3) "不用200元" (Functional: Price highlight). (4) "它好香!" (Decorative: Expressing excitement about the smell). (5) "198元" (Functional: Specifying the price). (6) "兩個人剛剛好!" (Decorative: Suggesting the portion size is perfect for two). (7) "雞油給得滿滿" (Decorative: Describing the juiciness of the meat). (8) "太值得買了" (Hook: Strong purchase recommendation).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at supermarket -> Product demonstration -> Taste test and review at home

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 child in background, 2 male passers-by in the supermarket background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a white top with a black skirt; the second woman wears a blue denim hat and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half shows a Costco-style supermarket with refrigerated shelves full of food. The second half shows a domestic kitchen or dining area with a counter and kitchen appliances in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright artificial supermarket lighting and warm domestic indoor lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional food review aimed at small families or couples, highlighting the value and convenience of a new 4-pack roasted chicken leg product from Costco (Kirkland Signature). It uses high-energy delivery and close-up 'mukbang' style eating shots to appeal to viewers' appetites and price consciousness.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the product, display of brand packaging, and price-to-value analysis.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful text overlays and variety-show style sound effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media trend of 'Costco hauls' and food reviews, focusing on practical buying advice for urban dwellers.
